ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Code of the stock (e.g., sh.600233) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* IPO date of the stock */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "preclose" REAL /* Previous closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount traded */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_prices" (
  "daily_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily price record */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock price record */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for the daily price (e.g., HH, LL, LH) */,
  "UpOrDown" TEXT /* Direction of the price change (Up or Down) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("daily_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_prices_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weekly_prices" (
  "weekly_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weekly price record */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock price record */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for the weekly price (e.g., HH, LL, LH) */,
  "UpOrDown" TEXT /* Direction of the price change (Up or Down) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weekly_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weekly_prices_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_prices" (
  "monthly_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monthly price record */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock price record */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for the monthly price (e.g., HH, LL, LH) */,
  "UpOrDown" TEXT /* Direction of the price change (Up or Down) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monthly_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_prices_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_settings" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being monitored */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Price change threshold for the alert */,
  "volume_change" REAL /* Volume change threshold for the alert */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_settings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert setting that triggered the alert */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_alert_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_setting_id") REFERENCES alert_settings ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the news article is related to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the news article was published */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_price_change" (
  "price_change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price change record */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock price record */,
  "change" REAL /* Absolute change in stock price */,
  "pct_change" REAL /* Percentage change in stock price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_change_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volume_change" (
  "volume_change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume change record */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock price record */,
  "change" REAL /* Absolute change in trading volume */,
  "pct_change" REAL /* Percentage change in trading volume */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volume_change_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock split */,
  "ratio" REAL /* Split ratio (e.g., 2:1, 3:2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the dividend payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Dividend amount per share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
